subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Thou Who drawest hearts with the magnet of the love that doth overflow existence, and Who quickeneth the mouldering bones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا جاذب القلوب بمغناطیس المحبه الفائضه علی الوجود و محیی العظم الرمیم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @love of God, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
